arts.ttl: Galatasaray Eye Emerson Royal as Milan Prepares for Walker’s Arrival
arts.sum: AC Milan are considering a potential departure for Emerson Royal after the Brazilian full-back has been approached by Galatasaray. The Turkish club has initiated contact with Milan regarding the 25-year-old defender, who arrived at the club just months ago from Tottenham Hotspur. The post Galatasaray Eye Emerson Royal as Milan Prepares for Walker’s Arrival appeared first on FootItalia.com.
